violations.description: Food supplies. — --Food item obtained from unapproved source. -Observed home canned products in pantry refrigerator.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. -Observed nothing date marked in refrigerators and moldy food in refrigerator.
General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Food contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in good repair or sound condition. -Observed upright freezer needs to be defrosted.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Observed dried food inside microwave. -Observed dried food inside refrigerators. -Observed inside of all freezers need to be cleaned.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Observed outside of all appliances need to be cleaned.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. -Observed box of single use items on floor of dining room.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Observed floor in food prep area needs to be cleaned.
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
